title: AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 - Apply for 02 Project Research Scientist and Project Technical Support II Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for the 02 Project Research Scientist and Project Technical Support II Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, Ph.D, and DMLT can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts....
